Tournaments & Events
info⛳️ 2026 Golf Season

All tee time bookings will require a VALID credit card to finalize and secure your reservation. Your credit card is NOT being charged at the time you make the reservation. We have implemented this practice to help reduce guests that fail to cancel their reservation or show up for their round of golf, as this limits our ability to offer Toronto residents access to affordable daily-fee golf. The use of an INVALID credit card will result in the immediate cancellation of your reservation.

 

Golfers that fail to show up for their reservation or fail to cancel their reservation at least 24 hours in advance of their tee time may be charged for the full green fees for the entire group. Again, if you do not show up for your reserved tee time and fail to cancel within 24 hours, a NO-SHOW FEE MAY BE CHARGED TO YOUR CARD.


You can easily cancel you reservation by visiting the my itinerary section of the booking engine, selecting the tee time you want to cancel, click manage and proceed to cancel. This can also be found by clicking My Account --> My Itinerary and then selecting “manage” my reservation and selecting to cancel the reservation.
